dealerAccountId.title: Dealer Account Id
dealerAccountId.description: Dealership Account Id. DEFAULT to 001bm00001iMVjGAAW (Electra Downtown SF). NEVER ask the rep for this — always use the default unless they explicitly name another dealership.

daysAhead.title: Days Ahead
daysAhead.description: How many days ahead to include. 0 = today only (default). 7 = today + next 7 days.
